_publications._publicationTitle: CDK4/6-MEK Inhibition in MPNSTs Causes Plasma Cell Infiltration, Sensitization to PD-L1 Blockade, and Tumor Regression.

_contextSnippet: Phospho-RB1 (p-RB1) S807/811 was a readout of cyclin D-CDK4/6 inhibition...dual CDK4/6-MEK inhibition caused moderate to significantly reduced p-RB1 compared to monotherapies
details: Used as readout of cyclin D-CDK4/6 inhibition, showing moderate to significantly reduced p-RB1 with dual CDK4/6-MEK inhibition compared to monotherapies
